subject: Happy new year!
body:
Hi Jeffrey,

How are u? Long time..

I guess I never really thanked you for all that you did for me at the time. Thank you, I really appreciated everything, the experiences, the opportunities, the fun.. Those were really good times.

You might've probably guessed that I'm writing as well to ask you for something lol. Let me explain first what I've been doing recently. So in December 2012 I graduated from a yoga teacher training course here in São Paulo. I've been teaching since May at a small studio and have a few private students as well. I have to say that I'm barely making any money yet, but I've learned and improved a lot. Still there's soooo much more to learn of course. I've only been doing yoga for the past two years. So recently I've decided that I want to (need to) go to India to stay in an ashram. I really think it will help me on my spiritual, emotional and consequently professional growth. I've been having a hard time finding places to teach due to my lack of experience. And things there are cheap as u probably know. Most expensive part is the air ticket. So.. I wanted to ask for a donation, anything will help, towards my spiritual evolution. 

Would be nice to see u again as well. I have to say that I haven't aged a bit lol, plus I'm still single. I actually look and feel better than I did 10 years ago. ;)

Big kiss

Sent from my iPad
